mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_active_day (user_id, active_date, first_seen_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activeDate}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = user_id
mapper.select: SELECT active_date AS activeDate, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_active_day WHERE active_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY active_date ORDER BY active_date ASC
